title: Radiant Wilds
description: Albion Online enters a new era with a sweeping visual overhaul, the Armory tool, 1v1 Arena, controller support, and major performance improvements.

title: Realm Divided
description: A massive update bringing faction warfare rework, new Avalon roads, and territory control changes.

title: Abyssal Depths
description: Dive into new underwater content, updated Hellgates, and expanded crafting systems.

title: Rogue Frontier
description: New Rogue faction, open-world rework, and improved guild management tools.

title: Horizons
description: New biome, sailing improvements, and expanded economy features.

title: Paths to Glory
description: Competitive PvP seasons, new arena maps, and ranked rewards system.

title: Foundations
description: Island overhaul, new building system, and housing customization.

title: Crystal Raiders
description: Crystal Arena rework, new raid content, and guild progression changes.

title: Wild Blood
description: Hunteress update, new mount system, and open-world PvP improvements.
